emails.subject: Metal Exchange GTCs
emails.body: Metal Exchange GTCs Gentlemen, I have attached the GTC and other legal info given on e-steel, MetalSite and Aluminum.com. Just in case you haven't had a chance to look........

emails.subject: Re: Metal Exchange GTCs
emails.body: Re: Metal Exchange GTCs This is the first time I've seen these. Could you call me to discuss on Monday to get the background on these documents? I'll be out tomorrow, but back in on Monday a.m. Also, Mark and I visited yesterday about the legal checklist you sent to us and we have a few additional points to add. We will get you our list early next week if that's ok. Alan Darren Maloney@ENRON 04/20/2000 02:10 PM

emails.subject: Re: Metal Exchange GTCs
emails.body: Next week is fine. I just printed out the GTC's from the other sites because I had not looked at them. They had not been previously circulated, and our initial discussions made me think about the issues we tabled. Let me know times that work for you. I will be in Monday through Thursday. Only Monday and Wednesday after 5:15pm are bad for me. --Darren Maloney 36661 Alan Aronowitz@ECT 04/20/2000 04:50 PM
